overall.description: A cinematic drone camera flies through a vast paved plaza in front of a historic stadium under dramatic stormy skies. The footage showcases the Olympiastadion Berlin in Gran Turismo 7, with the camera smoothly panning to reveal the iconic twin-towered facade before continuing down the tree-lined esplanade.

scene_state.functional_zone: vast paved plaza with tree-lined edges

events.description: camera begins turning right to reveal stadium structure
stadium building with twin towers comes into view

agents.ego_description: smoothly flying forward through the plaza while panning right to survey the surroundings

entered.detail: dense row of green deciduous trees lining the left edge of the plaza
dense row of green deciduous trees lining the right edge of the plaza
expansive paved surface with geometric tile pattern in beige and grey tones
grey concrete skate park ramp structure in the middle distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a smooth drone flight through a vast empty plaza, flanked by dense tree lines on both sides under dramatic storm clouds. The camera moves forward while gradually turning right, revealing a large skate ramp structure before the historic stadium building comes into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: stadium approach with classical stone facade

events.description: sunlight breaks through clouds creating dramatic illumination on the stadium facade

agents.ego_description: hovering and slowly approaching the grand stadium entrance while maintaining focus on the twin towers

entered.detail: massive historic stone stadium with two tall symmetrical towers and classical colonnade facade
curved stone wall with greenery on top marking the stadium perimeter
curved stone wall with greenery on top marking the stadium perimeter

segments.scene_description: The camera now faces the iconic Olympiastadion directly, showcasing its imposing twin towers and classical stone architecture against the stormy sky. The plaza opens up to the stadium approach, with curved stone walls marking the entrance as the camera slowly advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: long ceremonial plaza avenue with distant structures

events.description: camera turns right to face away from stadium down the long plaza axis
distant white canopy structures and red building become visible at the plaza end

agents.ego_description: turning away from the stadium and accelerating down the long tree-lined plaza toward distant structures

entered.detail: cluster of white tent-like or canopy structures visible at the far end of the plaza
small rectangular red building or container structure on the right side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera turns away from the stadium and proceeds down the long ceremonial avenue, with tree lines returning to frame both sides. A small red building appears on the right while distant white canopy structures mark the horizon, maintaining the dramatic overcast atmosphere throughout the expansive plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drone flight through a vast, empty plaza that transitions from a tree-lined approach to a direct view of a historic stadium before receding down a ceremonial avenue. It begins by gliding between dense rows of trees under dramatic storm clouds, gradually turning right to pass a large skate ramp as the stadium first emerges. As the camera aligns with the architecture, the view opens up to showcase the imposing twin towers and classical stone facade of the Olympiastadion against the overcast sky. The scene then shifts as the camera turns away from the entrance, proceeding down a long avenue framed once again by trees. This forward motion continues past a small red building on the right toward distant white canopy structures on the horizon.
